pageContext.name: Be@rbrick UNKLE x Studio Ar.Mour  100% & 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy present the Be@rbrick UNKLE x Studio Ar.Mour. 100% & 400% Collectible Set!  Standing at approximately 2.75' and 11.02' tall, this Be@rbrick set features a beautiful design and the 400% figure has the lightning function. It requires two (2) type C batteries that are not included in the set.  Don't miss your chance to add this Be@rbrick set to your collection today!
